prompt: Turn this SKILL.md into a production-ready web app with an OpenAI-compatible model provider, tool calling, state, review, and evals.
Design a provider-agnostic agent runtime for our finance anomaly review SOP and build the first vertical slice.
reason: Requests provider-agnostic agent runtime and app implementation.

prompt: We have a sales qualification SOP. Build it into a real internal app with auth, database, queue for long jobs, and human approval before sending emails.
reason: Converts business SOP into AI-native full app with product infrastructure.

prompt: Our current AI app is just one chat endpoint. Add runtime traces, structured output validation, tool execution, evals, and deployment configuration.
reason: Asks to move from single-call app to runtime-owned AI app.

reason: Frontend styling task without Skill-to-App or AI runtime work.

prompt: Deploy this static website to Vercel.
reason: Deployment-only task without AI-native app or Skill transformation.

prompt: Write a simple SKILL.md for summarizing meeting transcripts.
reason: Skill creation only; should use skill-creator unless converting that skill into an app.
